gt_sql: SELECT name FROM races WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = ( SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', date) FROM races ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND STRFTIME('%m', date) = ( SELECT STRFTIME('%m', date) FROM races ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 1 )
pred_sql: SELECT name FROM races WHERE STRFTIME('%Y-%m', date) = (SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', MIN(date)) FROM races);
question: List the names of all races that occurred in the earliest recorded year and month.
